name: Lemon Chicken
recipeInstructions:
Lemon Sauce
1 1/2 cups water
1/2 cup lemon juice
3 1/2 tablespoons light brown sugar (packed)
3 tablespoons cornstarch
3 tablespoons honey
2 teaspoons instant chicken bouillon granules
1 teaspoon fresh grated ginger root
For Chicken
1. Remove skin from chicken and discard. Cut breasts in half. Remove and discard bones.
2. In a small bowl, combine cornstarch, salt, and pepper. Gradually blend in water and egg yolks.
3. Heat oil in a wok over high heat until it reaches 375°F (190°C). Dip chicken breasts one at a time into the cornstarch egg yolk mixture. Fry breasts two or three at a time in hot oil until golden, about 5 minutes. Drain breasts on absorbent paper and keep warm while cooking remaining chicken.
4. Cut each breast into three or four pieces and arrange on serving plates. Sprinkle with sliced green onions.
For Sauce
5. Combine all ingredients in a medium saucepan. Stir until blended. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until the sauce boils and thickens, about 5 minutes. Pour over chicken.
